channel.title: Audio Plugin Guy - Deals Feed
channel.description: Las mejores ofertas de Audio Plugin Guy.

item.title: [SAVE BIG] Vicious Antelope|Get 83% off Troy Bundle for Omnisphere 3 by Vicious Antelope for $24.99 (Normally $144)
[FREEBIE] [SAVE BIG] VGTrumpet|VGTrumpet has updated VG Wind Ensemble Core edition, a free virtual instrument plugin for Mac & Win
[SAVE BIG] Nembrini Audio|Nembrini Audio Summer Sale – up to 80% off on all desktop products, up to 50% off on all iOS apps
[SAVE BIG] Dustons|Dustons has announced its Summer Sale, offering a special price of $99.95 for the Access Virus Ti / Ti2 / OsTIrus Anthology, down from $499.95
[FREEBIE] [SAVE BIG] umu|Get Unshuffle by UMU, a free desktop sample library organizer
[FREEBIE] [SAVE BIG] [HOT] W.A. Production|W.A. Production is offering Vocal Splitter plugin as a free download. Use the code: GETWAVS
item.description: Descuento: 100% - Desarrollador: W.A. Production - Finaliza: Unknown
